headline: Airbnb Broadens Travel Platform As 2026 Growth Expectations Build
summary: Airbnb (NasdaqGS:ABNB) is expanding beyond home rentals to include experiences, practical travel services, and hotels. Management is signaling a shift in the business model toward a broader travel platform. The company is forecasting a reacceleration in revenue growth in 2026 linked to these new offerings. For investors, this broadening of Airbnb's platform puts the company more directly in line with full service travel providers, not just online rental marketplaces. The move comes as...

headline: Conductor Introduces AEO Trailblazer Awards, Recognizing Enterprise Brands Leading in AI Search Visibility
summary: NEW YORK, March 24, 2026--Conductor, the only end-to-end enterprise AEO platform, today announced the winners of its inaugural AEO Trailblazer Awards, recognizing enterprise brands that are redefining how visibility is earned in AI-powered search.
